Podcast Operations

Project Management · Case Study · Documentation

About

Organized, reliable, and genuinely invested in your success.

I'm Charry, a Virtual Assistant from the Philippines with a BS in Environmental Engineering from MSU-IIT. My engineering background means I bring systematic thinking to everything I manage — whether that's a podcast pipeline, a Shopify catalog, or a content team's project board.

I specialize in podcast operations and project management for content creators and small teams who need someone they can actually hand things off to.
